description: Known Java-vs-.NET runtime parity divergences. Entries are matched by operation and optional file, fileGlob, category, or categoryGlob.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for rendering rows.
entries.ratchet: Known rows covered by this entry must not increase; remove fixture names as rendering parity improves.
entries.reason: Rendering minimal parser fixtures currently throws before producing Java-compatible blank-page output.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for text rows.
entries.ratchet: Known rows covered by this entry must not increase; remove fixture names as text parity improves.
entries.reason: Text extraction for minimal parser fixtures currently throws before producing Java-compatible text output.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for text extraction.
entries.ratchet: The total known text rows must trend down and must not exceed the checked-in ratchet baseline.
entries.reason: Default PDFTextStripper semantic output still differs from Java for many successful text extraction cases.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for rendering rows.
entries.ratchet: The total known render detail mismatches must trend down and must not exceed the checked-in ratchet baseline.
entries.reason: Successful render output still differs from Java until remaining PageDrawer glyph, color, pattern, annotation, and image fidelity work lands.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for rendering rows.
entries.ratchet: Known rows covered by this entry must not increase; remove fixture names as remaining fallback rendering becomes non-placeholder.
entries.reason: These first-page text renders remain near-blank on Linux until non-Standard14 fallback and embedded-font drawing match Java more closely.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for pattern color-space rendering.
entries.ratchet: Known rows covered by this entry must not increase; remove this entry when survey.pdf renders like Java.
entries.reason: Pattern color space rendering fails until advanced rendering work is implemented.
